flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Massachusetts Institute of Technology rose 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.5k → $14.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Massachusetts Institute of Technology rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.9k → $62.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Massachusetts Institute of Technology rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.9k → $62.4k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Massachusetts Institute of Technology are 127% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($143.4k vs $63.2k).
